title: CC:Destroy Bridge
description: CC:Destroy Bridge is a CC:C Bridge Addon Mod that adds compatibility with Destroy mod.
body:
# CC:Destroy Bridge

Available for **1.20.1 Forge**.
Requires [CC:C Bridge](https://modrinth.com/mod/cccbridge) *1.6.3* and [Destroy](https://modrinth.com/mod/destroy) *0.8*!
  
About
-----
This mod adds interop between [CC:Tweaked](https://modrinth.com/mod/cc-tweaked) and [Destroy](https://modrinth.com/mod/destroy) (currently Vat only).

Description
-----------
![vat_with_computer.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/514a73ab8c84e2cb85a2622761dcdf8247e03e1b.png)

Vat Controller exposes following Lua functions:
```
getPressure(): float
getTemperature(): float
getUVStrength(): float
getCapacity(): float
getFluidLevel(): float
getMixture(): Map<String, Float>
```
![computer_v1.1.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/166086f8b27022331905ede1fbc8c689e91d0b83.png)
(New Format: Vat getMixture() returns key as ID by default)

![screen_with_periph.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e90484de783f02da7234d9930a2890b07ee5079.png)
(Old Format)
